Years Licensed
Her Story

She Hit the
Ground Running

Julia — known to almost everyone as Jewels — has been a licensed cosmetologist since 2007. But her education started long before beauty school.

“I have been very blessed in my career. Before beauty school and years after, I got to apprentice under some of the top hair artists in the industry. They opened up doors to a whole new world in the beauty industry beyond the cuts and color. I was doing hair for New York Fashion Week and hair and makeup for editorial work that always required ‘a look that no one has ever seen’ or ‘give them wow.’ That wow was adding more hair!”

— Jewels Cater

Extensions became her obsession, from the runway to everyday looks. It wasn’t just the transformations — though watching a client turn around in the chair and squeal with delight, or be shocked (sometimes with a few happy profanities), is still her favorite part of the job. It was the craft. The color-matching. The placement strategy. The way a seamless install could change how someone carries themselves walking out the door.

So she went deep. She pursued certification after certification — amassing 11 certifications and two patents — mastering K-Tip keratin bond, hand-tied weft, IBE, and beaded weft methods. Today, extensions are the only thing she does. That focus makes the difference.

Credentials

11 Certifications.
2 Patents.
One Specialty.

Every certification represents hands-on training and tested technique. The patents represent something rarer: original contribution to the craft.

✦

StrandSafe™ Certified

All four StrandSafe™ certification levels completed — 11 certifications total across K-Tip, Hand-Tied Weft, IBE, and Beaded Weft methods. The most rigorous extension education program available.

✦

2 Industry Patents

Jewels holds two patents in the hair extension industry — a distinction held by almost no working stylists. Her contributions aren’t just in the chair. They’re in the craft itself.

✦

Licensed Cosmetologist Since 2007

18+ years behind the chair, with a full foundation in color, cut, and hair health before going all-in on extensions. That foundation is why her installs last.

✦

Bellami Professional Partner

Access to Bellami’s full professional extension line — 100% human hair in 80+ professionally developed shades for precise, seamless color matching.

From the Runway

NYFW Backstage
to Your Chair

Before Jewels built her extension practice in Minnesota, she was backstage at New York Fashion Week — part of teams creating looks for editorial shoots and runway shows where the only brief was “a look that no one has ever seen.”

That environment taught her something most stylists never learn: extensions aren’t a shortcut. They’re a precision craft. The color has to be exact. The placement has to be intentional. The blend has to be invisible. Anything less and the camera — or the mirror — will catch it.

That runway standard is what she brings to every single client at Volition Salon. Whether you’re getting extensions for a wedding, a confidence boost, or because you’ve always wanted longer hair — you get the same precision she developed backstage at Fashion Week.

Beyond the Chair

The Real Jewels

Yes, she has 11 certifications. Yes, she’s been doing hair since 2007 and done it on runways in New York. But here’s what actually matters for finding your person: Jewels is the kind of stylist who tells you the truth.

If your hair isn’t ready for extensions, she’ll say so — and give you a real plan to get it there. If a method isn’t right for your lifestyle, she’ll steer you toward one that is. The consult is free and there’s never any pressure.

When she’s not color-matching extensions and deep in a consultation, you’ll find her sipping a good reposado tequila and down a rabbit hole on whatever conspiracy theory has caught her attention that week. She’s a lot of fun, genuinely cares about every single client, and her energy in the salon is exactly what you want when you’re nervous about a big change.
